title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 490.590 - Marriage contracts
text:
490.590.  Marriage contracts. — Marriage contracts, duly proved or acknowledged and certified and recorded, shall be received in evidence in any court in this state, without further proof of their execution.
(RSMo 1939 § 1870) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1706; 1919 § 5393; 1909 § 6337
